option.name: --tunnel
tip: Execute tasks with a tunnel to Deno Deploy

option.name: --use-env-proxy
tip: Use HTTP_PROXY, HTTPS_PROXY, and NO_PROXY for node:http/node:https

option.name: --watch
tip: Watch for file changes and restart process automatically

option.name: --watch-exclude
tip: Exclude provided files/patterns from watch mode

option.name: --watch-hmr
tip: Watch for file changes and hot-replace modules

next.name: why
tip: Show why a package is installed

global_option.name: --allow-scripts
tip: Allow running npm lifecycle scripts for the given packages

global_option.name: --cached-only
tip: Require that remote dependencies are already cached

global_option.name: --cert
tip: Load certificate authority from PEM encoded file

global_option.name: --conditions
tip: Specify custom conditions for npm package exports

global_option.name: --coverage
tip: Collect coverage profile data into DIR

global_option.name: --cpu-prof
tip: Start the V8 CPU profiler on startup and write the profile to disk on exit

global_option.name: --cpu-prof-dir
tip: Directory where the V8 CPU profiles will be written

global_option.name: --cpu-prof-flamegraph
tip: Generate an SVG flamegraph alongside the CPU profile

global_option.name: --cpu-prof-interval
tip: Sampling interval in microseconds for CPU profiling

global_option.name: --cpu-prof-md
tip: Generate a human-readable markdown report alongside the CPU profile

global_option.name: --env-file
tip: Load environment variables from local file

global_option.name: --ext
tip: Set content type of the supplied file

global_option.name: --frozen
tip: Error out if lockfile is out of date

global_option.name: --import-map
tip: Load import map file from local file or remote URL

global_option.name: --inspect-brk
tip: Activate inspector, wait for debugger and break at start

global_option.name: --inspect-wait
tip: Activate inspector and wait for debugger before running

global_option.name: --location
tip: Value of globalThis.location used by some web APIs

global_option.name: --minimum-dependency-age
tip: (Unstable) The age in minutes, ISO-8601 duration or RFC3339 timestamp

global_option.name: --no-clear-screen
tip: Do not clear terminal screen when under watch mode

global_option.name: --no-config
tip: Disable automatic loading of the configuration file

global_option.name: --no-lock
tip: Disable auto discovery of the lock file

global_option.name: --no-prompt
tip: Always throw if required permission wasn't passed

global_option.name: --node-modules-dir
tip: Selects the node_modules directory mode for npm packages

global_option.name: --node-modules-linker
tip: Sets the linker mode for npm packages

global_option.name: --preload
tip: A list of files that will be executed before the main module

global_option.name: --require
tip: A list of CommonJS modules that will be executed before the main module

global_option.name: --seed
tip: Set the random number generator seed

tip: Execute tasks with a tunnel to Deno Deploy

global_option.name: --unstable
